    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    C

    checkRuleConflicts(Rule, Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.service.ConflictDetectionService
    Checks whether a specific rule conflicts with existing active rules that target the same device.
    checkScheduleConflicts(Schedule, Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.service.ConflictDetectionService
    Checks whether a specific schedule conflicts with existing active schedules.
    clearCommands() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
    Clears the recorded command history.
    ConflictDetectionService - Klasse in at.jku.se.service
    Detects scheduling and rule conflicts that could send contradictory commands to the same device (FR-15).
    ConflictDetectionService() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.service.ConflictDetectionService
    Creates the service; intended for CDI instantiation.
    ConflictResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for scheduling conflict detection (FR-15).
    ConflictResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ConflictResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    ConflictResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO describing a scheduling or rule conflict (FR-15).
    ConflictResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Creates an empty conflict response; fields are populated by the service layer.
    conflictType - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    The type of conflict: SCHEDULE_SCHEDULE, RULE_RULE, or RULE_SCHEDULE.
    connect() - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Opens the connection to the underlying hardware or broker.
    connect() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    connect() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
     
    consumptionWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.EnergyLogRequest
    Energy consumed in watt-hours (Wh) during the measurement period.
    consumptionWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyLogResponse
    Energy consumed in watt-hours (Wh) during the measurement period.
    consumptionWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.EnergyLog
    Energy consumed in watt-hours (Wh) during the logging period.
    create() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocolFactory
    Instantiates the configured IoT protocol adapter.
    create(RoomRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RoomResource
    Creates a new room for the specified user (FR-03).
    create(RuleRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RuleResource
    Creates a new automation rule (FR-10, FR-11).
    create(SceneRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
    Creates a new scene with optional device target states (FR-17).
    create(ScheduleRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ScheduleResource
    Creates a new schedule with conflict detection (FR-09, FR-15).
    create(VacationModeRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.VacationModeResource
    Creates a new vacation mode configuration (FR-21).
    createdAt - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.NotificationResponse
    Timestamp when the notification was created.
    createdAt - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.UserResponse
    Timestamp when the account was created.
    createdAt - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Notification
    When the notification was created.
    createdAt - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.User
    Timestamp when the account was created.
    createDevice(Long, DeviceCreateRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RoomResource
    Adds a new virtual device to a room (FR-04).
    cronExpression - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Cron expression (5-field: minute hour day month weekday).
    cronExpression - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Cron expression defining when the schedule runs.
    cronExpression - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    Cron expression defining the recurrence pattern (e.g., "0 7 * * MON-FRI").
